Part.Source:
&MensagemAlterada = '' &MensagemInserida = '' &OldPedQtd = 0 &PedQtdFat = 0
For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod
&ProGraRef = ProGraRef &GrupCom = GrupCom &PedVlrCus = ProVlrCus
&PedVlrCusPrd = 0 Do Case Case ProTipCus = TipoCusto.Receita &PedVlrCusPrd = ProVlrCusPrd
Case ProTipCus = TipoCusto.CustoProdutoEstoque &PedVlrCusPrd = retornaCustoProducao.Udp(EmpCod, ProEstProCod) EndCase
&ProTipDef = ProTipDef
&PedProEstProCod = ProEstProCod &PedProEstProGraCod = &ProGraCod
Exit EndFor
//GRAVA LOG &TabelaVarchar = 'PEDIDOPRODUTO' &LogErpTabIsLog = prcGetIsGravarLog.Udp(&EmpCod, &TabelaVarchar) &LogErpRegCod1 = trim(Str(&PedCod))
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod
&PedDtaFat = PedDtaFat &LctAtuEst = LctAtuEst &LctAtuSal = LctAtuSal &LctAtuPro = LctAtuPro &LctTip = LctTip &LctGerFin = LctGerFin &PedSts = PedSts
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod Where PedItmCod = &PedItmCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod
&OldPedQtd = PedQtd &OldPedQtdSdo = PedQtdSdo &PedQtdFat = PedQtdFat
&OldPedVlrCus = PedVlrCus //&PedVlrCusPrd = PedVlrCusPrd If &PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO or &PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO Do 'AbreEstoque' EndIF
if &LogErpTabIsLog = true &LogErpRegCod2 = trim(toformattedString(PedItmCod)) &LogErpRegTip = TrnMode.Update &LogErpRegGUID.SetEmpty() //&wwpContextUserName -- TENTE NAO USAR O LoadWwpContext, e Sim trazer informacao por parametro onde ja tem o Context em tela carregado. prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ProCod', trim(toformattedString(ProCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ProCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ProGraCod', trim(toformattedString(ProGraCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ProGraCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedProEstProCod', trim(toformattedString(PedProEstProCod)), trim(toformattedString(&PedProEstProCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedProEstProGraCod', trim(toformattedString(PedProEstProGraCod)), trim(toformattedString(&PedProEstProGraCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedQtdCan', trim(toformattedString(PedQtdCan)), trim(toformattedString(&PedQtdCan)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedQtd', trim(toformattedString(PedQtd)), trim(toformattedString(&PedQtd)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedVlrUnt', trim(toformattedString(PedVlrUnt)), trim(toformattedString(&PedVlrUnt)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedItmDsc', trim(toformattedString(PedItmDsc)), trim(toformattedString(&PedItmDsc)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedItmVenCod', trim(toformattedString(PedItmVenCod)), trim(toformattedString(&PedItmVenCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedQtdEmb', trim(toformattedString(PedQtdEmb)), trim(toformattedString(&PedQtd)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedProEmbQtd', trim(toformattedString(PedProEmbQtd)), trim(toformattedString(&PedProEmbQtd)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedItmCmp', trim(toformattedString(PedItmCmp)), trim(toformattedString(&PedItmCmp)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedVlrTab', trim(toformattedString(PedVlrTab)), trim(toformattedString(&PedVlrTab)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedVlrCusPrd', trim(toformattedString(PedVlrCusPrd)), trim(toformattedString(&PedVlrCusPrd)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedVlrCus', trim(toformattedString(PedVlrCus)), trim(toformattedString(&PedVlrCus)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif//GRAVA LOG
PedProEstProCod = &PedProEstProCod PedProEstProGraCod = &PedProEstProGraCod
PedQtd = &PedQtd
If &PedQtdCan >= 0 PedQtdCan = &PedQtdCan Else PedQtdCan = 0 EndIF
PedVlrCus = &PedVlrCus PedVlrCusPrd = &PedVlrCusPrd PedItmCmp = &PedItmCmp PedItmVenCod = &PedItmVenCod PedProEmbQtd = 0 PedQtdEmb = &PedQtd PedVlrTab = &PedVlrTab PedVlrUnt = &PedVlrUnt PedItmDsc = &PedItmDsc
If &PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO or &PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO do 'FechaEstoque' EndIF
if &ProTipDef = Definicao.SERVICO &MensagemInserida = 'Serviço ' +trim(&ProGraRef)+ ', atualizado com sucesso. QTD:' + trim(toformattedString(&PedQtd)) Else &MensagemInserida = 'Produto ' +trim(&ProGraRef)+ ', atualizado com sucesso. QTD:' + trim(toformattedString(&PedQtd)) EndIF Exit When none &PedItmCod = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, (PedItmCod) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedCod = &PedCod &PedItmCod = PedItmCod Exit EndFor
&PedItmCod += 1 new EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &FilCod PedCod = &PedCod PedItmCod = &PedItmCod ProCod = &ProCod ProGraCod = &ProGraCod PedProEstProCod = &PedProEstProCod PedProEstProGraCod = &PedProEstProGraCod PedProEmbQtd = 0 PedQtdEmb = &PedQtd PedQtd = &PedQtd PedQtdCan = 0 PedVlrCus = &PedVlrCus PedVlrCusPrd = &PedVlrCusPrd //PedItmIpi //PedItmIcmSt //PedItmAcr
PedItmCmp = &PedItmCmp PedItmVenCod = &PedItmVenCod PedVlrTab = &PedVlrTab PedVlrUnt = &PedVlrUnt PedItmDsc = &PedItmDsc //PedItmPrm = &PedItmPrm //PedItmCom = &PedItmCom PedItmDtaAdd = ServerNow() PedCodOciRefItm = &PedCodOciRefItm
If &PedSts = Status_Pedido.FECHADO or &PedSts = Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO Do 'FechaEstoque' EndIF EndNew
if &LogErpTabIsLog = true &LogErpRegCod2 = trim(toformattedString(&PedItmCod)) &LogErpRegTip = TrnMode.Insert &LogErpRegGUID.SetEmpty() //&wwpContextUserName -- TENTE NAO USAR O LoadWwpContext, e Sim trazer informacao por parametro onde ja tem o Context em tela carregado. prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ProCod', '', trim(toformattedString(&ProCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ProGraCod', '', trim(toformattedString(&ProGraCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedProEstProCod', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedProEstProCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedProEstProGraCod', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedProEstProGraCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedQtdCan', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedQtdCan)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedQtd', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedQtd)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedVlrUnt', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedVlrUnt)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedItmDsc', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedItmDsc)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedItmVenCod', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedItmVenCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedQtdEmb', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedQtd)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedProEmbQtd', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedProEmbQtd)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedItmCmp', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedItmCmp)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedVlrTab', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedVlrTab)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedVlrCusPrd', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedVlrCusPrd)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, &LogErpRegCod2, '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'PedVlrCus', '', trim(toformattedString(&PedVlrCus)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif//GRAVA LOG
if &ProTipDef = Definicao.SERVICO &MensagemInserida = 'Serviço ' +trim(&ProGraRef)+ ', adicionado com sucesso. QTD:' + trim(toformattedString(&PedQtd)) Else &MensagemInserida = 'Produto ' +trim(&ProGraRef)+ ', adicionado com sucesso. QTD:' + trim(toformattedString(&PedQtd)) EndIF
EndFor Exit EndFor
commit
AtualizaTotaisPedido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &PedItmCod, 'I')
If &PedSts <> Status_Pedido.FECHADO and &PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO and &PedSts <> Status_Pedido.CANCELADO &AuxPedQtd = &PedQtd - &PedQtdFat AtualizaEstoqueCompradoVendido.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedProEstProCod, &PedProEstProGraCod, &OldPedQtdSdo, &AuxPedQtd, &LctAtuEst) EndIF
Sub 'AbreEstoque' //ATUALIZA ESTOQUE Do CAse CAse &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //EMPRESA ENTRADA if &PedProEstProGraCod > 1 AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod,1, &OldPedQtd, &OldPedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LCtTip, '-', '') Endif AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod,&PedProEstProGraCod, &OldPedQtd, &OldPedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LCtTip, '-', '')
CAse &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //EMPRESA SAIDA if &PedProEstProGraCod > 1 AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod,1, &OldPedQtd, &OldPedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LCtTip, '+', '') Endif AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod,&PedProEstProGraCod, &OldPedQtd, &OldPedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LCtTip, '+', '') EndCAse
//ATUALIZA PRODUCAO Do CAse CAse &LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //PRODUCAO ENTRADA if &PedProEstProGraCod > 1 AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod, 1, &OldPedQtd, &OldPedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '-') Endif AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod, &PedProEstProGraCod, &OldPedQtd, &OldPedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '-')
CAse &LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //PRODUCAO SAIDA if &PedProEstProGraCod > 1 AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod, 1, &OldPedQtd, &OldPedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '+') Endif AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod, &PedProEstProGraCod, &OldPedQtd, &OldPedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '+') EndCAse EndSub
Sub 'FechaEstoque' //ATUALIZA ESTOQUE Do CAse CAse &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //EMPRESA ENTRADA if &PedProEstProGraCod > 1 AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod,1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LCtTip, '+', '') Endif AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod,&PedProEstProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LCtTip, '+', '')
CAse &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //EMPRESA SAIDA if &PedProEstProGraCod > 1 AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod,1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LCtTip, '-', '') Endif AtualizaEstoqueEmpresa_EntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod,&PedProEstProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuEst, &LCtTip, '-', '') EndCAse
//ATUALIZA PRODUCAO Do CAse CAse &LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //PRODUCAO ENTRADA if &PedProEstProGraCod > 1 AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod, 1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '+') Endif AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod, &PedProEstProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '+')
CAse &LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //PRODUCAO SAIDA if &PedProEstProGraCod > 1 AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod, 1, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '-') Endif AtualizaProducaoEntradaSaida.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFat, &PedProEstProCod, &PedProEstProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrCus, &LctAtuPro, '-') EndCAse EndSub

parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&PedCod, inout:&PedItmCod, in:&ProCod, in:&ProGraCod, in:&PedQtd, in:&PedQtdCan, in:&PedVlrUnt, in:&PedVlrTab, in:&PedItmDsc, in:&PedItmCmp, in:&PedItmVenCod, in:&PedCodOciRefItm, out:&MensagemInserida, out:&MensagemAlterada, in:&wwpContextUserName);
